name: Shirai Electronics Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Shirai Electronics Industrial Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells printed wiring boards and printed wiring board visual inspection machines in Japan and internationally. It offers transparent flexible substrates; and double-sided/multi-layer printed wiring boards, high-performance boards, and MEMS field related products. The company was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Kyoto, Japan.
